GenAiFunction.description:
Encode PlantUML diagram text into a renderable image URL. This action does NOT invent diagrams — it only encodes PlantUML text you have already composed.
Use when: - The user asks for an ERD, class diagram, sequence diagram, or any other visualization of org schema, relationships, or processes. - You have fetched the relevant data via ExploreOrgSchema / ExploreDataCloud / CallToolingApi first, then composed valid PlantUML.
NOT for: - Fetching or exploring schema — use ExploreOrgSchema or ExploreDataCloud first. - Rendering non-PlantUML diagrams (mermaid, graphviz).
Input constraints: - Syntax must start with @startuml and end with @enduml. - Encoded URL length must stay under 2048 characters — for large schemas, reduce the PlantUML by dropping redundant fields or irrelevant entities before encoding. - Use UTF-8 for special characters.
Output: render the returned URL as an HTML <a target="_blank"> link so the user can open the diagram.
